description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden hutch cabinet with a dark brown finish, featuring a two-part structure: a lower desk with multiple drawers and an upper shelving unit with glass-paneled doors. The upper section has three glass doors with decorative framing and a central ornamental medallion, flanked by solid wood columns. The lower section consists of a wide desktop surface and two columns of drawers, each with metal handles, providing ample storage. The sides of the cabinet are solid wood with recessed panel detailing and small glass windows near the base of the upper section. The back is plain and unadorned, showing the wood grain. The overall design is robust and traditional, suitable for use in offices, libraries, or as a statement piece in urban interiors.
description: A large, dark brown wooden hutch cabinet with glass-paneled doors, multiple drawers, and ornate detailing, combining storage and display functions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood paneling, recessed details, and a small glass window at the base of the upper section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the glass-paneled doors, central decorative medallion, open shelf, and two columns of drawers with handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, with solid wood paneling and a small glass window at the base of the upper section.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned wooden back with visible wood grain and no openings or decorative features.
